title: Brog Resource Pack
description: When you combine Bro with Frog you get Brog. This is a resource pack that turns the Totem of Undying into Brog the Frog, and also converts Warm Frogs into Brogs.
body:
When you combine Bro with Frog you get Brog. Brog is a pink frog built by CringyGull on the Heckers SMP. If you displease him, he might eat you.

![Brog the frog totem being popped](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/24ec8f0b2c0a8947403278fa56ae02c836fbcd12.jpeg)

I created this pack by re-texturing and adjusting the animation from this resource pack: https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/frog-totem-of-undying
